symptom_vector: packet corruption and data corruption with bit errors on network causing corrupted packets

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: frontend 到 cartservice 之间的网络链路存在数据包损坏，表现为 pod_network_receive_bytes 和 pod_network_transmit_bytes 等网络指标异常，导致客户端错误率飙升
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 观察到 frontend 服务的 rrt 和 rrt_max 指标异常飙升，从约10k增加到11M+级别，变化率接近200%
Step 2: 分析 cartservice 组件的 client_error_ratio 和 error_ratio 指标在P99分位数上出现异常值（42.73%-49.36%），表明cartservice处理请求时遇到问题
Step 3: 确认故障描述涉及网络数据包损坏，需要检查 pod_network_receive_bytes、pod_network_receive_packets、pod_network_transmit_bytes、pod_network_transmit_packets 等网络层指标，但当前metric数据中未包含这些关键网络指标

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Spike from 0.0 to high percentage values
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 cartservice 实例的 client_error_ratio 指标是否从0.0飙升到异常水平

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Spike from 0.0 to high percentage values
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 cartservice 实例的 error_ratio 指标是否从0.0飙升到异常水平

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Dramatic increase from baseline (1000x or more)
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 frontend 服务的 rrt 指标是否出现1000倍以上的异常增长

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Extreme peak values compared to normal range
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 cartservice 的 rrt_max 指标是否出现极端峰值

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Abnormal patterns in network packet reception
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 frontend 和 cartservice 的 pod_network_receive_bytes 指标是否存在异常模式

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Unusual packet reception counts or patterns
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 frontend 和 cartservice 的 pod_network_receive_packets 指标是否存在异常

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Abnormal patterns in network packet transmission
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 frontend 和 cartservice 的 pod_network_transmit_bytes 指标是否存在异常模式

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Unusual packet transmission counts or patterns
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 frontend 和 cartservice 的 pod_network_transmit_packets 指标是否存在异常
